title: Ipomoea kwebensis
intro: Ipomoea kwebensis, also known as the Kweba morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, and research has identified its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to the treatment of various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal disorders. The bioactive constituents of Ipomoea kwebensis include flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional medicine, Ipomoea kwebensis is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it is also used in the form of a tincture or capsule to harness its medicinal benefits.
